info.title: TaskStak.CLI
info.description: TaskStak - A developer-focused, performant task management CLI tool

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: TaskStak - A developer-focused, performant task management CLI tool.

arguments.name: title
arguments.description: The title of the new or updated task.

arguments.name: date
arguments.description: Represents a date. Use a date format or use --today | -t, --tomorrow | -tm, --monday | -mon, --tuesday | -tue etc.

arguments.name: query
arguments.description: Search query argument. Use id or title of task.

arguments.name: query
arguments.description: Search query argument. Use id or title of task.

commands.name: move
commands.description: Move a task to a different status.

arguments.name: query
arguments.description: Search query argument. Use id or title of task.

commands.name: rm
commands.description: Removes a task completely. Cannot be undone.

arguments.name: query
arguments.description: Search query argument. Use id or title of task.

commands.name: pop
commands.description: Unstage a task from a stak.

arguments.name: query
arguments.description: Search query argument. Use id or title of task.

commands.name: push
commands.description: Stage a task to a stak for a particular date.

arguments.name: query
arguments.description: Search query argument. Use id or title of task.

arguments.name: date
arguments.description: Represents a date. Use a date format or use --today | -t, --tomorrow | -tm, --monday | -mon, --tuesday | -tue etc. [default: 04/01/2026]

commands.name: title
commands.description: Update the title of an existing task.

arguments.description: Search query argument. Use id or title of task.

arguments.name: date
arguments.description: Represents a date. Use a date format or use --today | -t, --tomorrow | -tm, --monday | -mon, --tuesday | -tue etc. [default: 04/01/2026]
